welcome.title: FlyFam
welcome.subtitle: Stay connected with your crew member's flights

signUp.title: Sign Up
signUp.subtitle: Create your account
signUp.errorFillAll: Please fill all fields and select a role
signUp.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
signUp.errorConsentRequired: You must accept KVKK/privacy notice and terms/disclaimer to continue.
signUp.errorConsentSave: Account created but consent records could not be saved. Please sign in again and contact support.
signUp.acceptPrivacyNotice: I have read and understood the KVKK/Privacy Notice.
signUp.acceptTermsDisclaimer: I accept the Terms of Use and Disclaimer.
signUp.acceptMarketingOptional: I want to receive campaign and announcement notifications (optional).
signUp.privacyNoticeBody: FlyFam processes account, profile, flight and connection data to provide the service, ensure security and provide support. Data is protected against unauthorized access and shared only when legally required. A full text will be available in app settings.
signUp.disclaimerBody: Flight information in FlyFam may come from third-party providers and can be delayed, incomplete, or inaccurate. It must not be used as the sole source for operational, safety, or official decisions.

completeProfile.title: Complete setup
completeProfile.subtitleCrew: Select your airline (Pegasus, Turkish Airlines, SunExpress, AJet)
completeProfile.subtitleFamily: You're all set. Connect to a crew member to get started.

profile.name: Name
profile.rosterListTasksHint: Flight segments (e.g. PC…) always appear. Toggle off-days (FSF/FOF), training, simulator, and other PDF duty rows. New duty codes may need an app update or list extension.
profile.rosterFontSizeHint: Roster text scales with this setting.
profile.rosterTimeDisplayHint: Local: station time and roster day as in the app. UTC: group and label by UTC calendar day; times shown as Z only. Crossing midnight can move a row to another UTC day.
profile.deleteAccountConfirmMessage: Your account and all related data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
profile.deleteAccountFailed: Could not delete your profile. Please try again.

consent.title: Consent Required
consent.subtitle: To continue using FlyFam, please accept the latest privacy/KVKK and terms/disclaimer texts.
consent.errorNoUser: User session could not be verified. Please sign in again.

roster.title: Roster
roster.noFlightsCrew: No flights yet. Add your first flight.
roster.noFlightsFamily: No upcoming flights. Connect to a crew member.
roster.allRosterRowsHidden: Nothing to show. Open list task settings (header or Profile) to enable duty types, or add roster items.
roster.notifySentMessage: Notification sent to your family ({{count}} family member(s)).
roster.notifyNoDevices: No family devices registered; notification not sent.
roster.clearAllMessage: All flights will be permanently deleted. Are you sure?
roster.clearAllError: An error occurred while deleting flights.
roster.clearAllSuccess: All flights have been removed from your roster.
roster.nextDayTimesA11y: Times are for the next day

addFlight.title: Add Flight
addFlight.importFlightsSuccess: Your flights have been imported. Please check your schedule.
addFlight.importFlightsSomeFailed: Some rows could not be added:
addFlight.importFlightsSkippedNonFlight: {{count}} non-flight row(s) skipped (only flight legs are imported for now).
addFlight.importFlightsAirlineRequired: Set your airline in Profile before importing a roster PDF.
addFlight.importFlightsAirlineImportNotSupportedMe: PDF roster import is not enabled for your selected airline yet. To help us add support, please send a sample roster PDF to the FlyFam team.
addFlight.importFlightsSkippedWrongAirline: {{count}} row(s) skipped — not valid for your profile airline (e.g. Turkish Airlines crew: TK flights only).
addFlight.importFlightsAllSkippedWrongAirline: No rows matched your profile airline (e.g. THY crew imports TK flights only).
addFlight.importFlightsOnlyNonFlights: No flight legs to import. Simulator / off-day rows are skipped at this step.
addFlight.importFlightsErrorHint: Check internet and that you are logged in (needed for Supabase Edge). The file must be a PDF. Details are logged in the Metro console in development.
addFlight.importScriptJsonHint: On your computer: cd mobile && npx tsx scripts/pdf-roster-preview.ts roster.pdf — copy the [ ... ] JSON from the output and paste it here. Matches the script exactly even if the app’s PDF text differs.
addFlight.importScriptJsonBad: Could not read JSON. Expected an array of objects with flight_number and flight_date.
addFlight.hintWithAirline: Airline code {{code}} is set. Enter only the numeric part (e.g. 614).
addFlight.hintNoAirline: Set your airline in Profile to get a prefilled code. Or enter full flight number (e.g. PC614).
addFlight.manualLabel: Route and times (optional — edit or add if lookup didn't find the flight)
addFlight.lookupFailedShort: No data found for this flight (yet).
addFlight.errorFullNumber: Enter full flight number (e.g. PC614) or set your airline in Profile
addFlight.errorDuplicate: This flight is already saved for this date.
addFlight.apiHint: For auto-lookup: add EXPO_PUBLIC_FLIGHTRADAR24_API_TOKEN to mobile/.env, then run: npx expo start --clear

editFlight.title: Edit Flight
editFlight.errorFlightNumber: Enter a valid flight number (e.g. PC614)

family.inviteHint: They'll receive an invitation in the app and can accept or decline
family.invitationsCount: You have {{count}} invitation(s) — tap to view
family.connectedSwipeHint: Connected family members — swipe left to remove
family.removeConfirmMessage: This person will no longer see your flights. Are you sure?
family.noConnectionsYet: No crew connections yet. Accept an invitation to get started.
family.dashboardSubtitle: Flights from your linked crew members
family.invitationSentMessage: {{email}} will see your invitation in the app and can accept or decline.
family.localTestMessage: You are on iOS Simulator, so real push cannot work. I sent a LOCAL test notification instead.
family.notificationsReason: We couldn't get a push token. Please allow notifications for FlyFam and try again. If you're on iOS Simulator, push won't work (needs a real device).
family.errorSignInAgain: Please sign in again and retry.
family.testSentDevices: Notification sent to {{count}} device(s). It may take 5–20 seconds to arrive.
family.testSentZeroMessage: No device token was found. Make sure you allowed notifications and try again. If you're using Expo Go, push may be limited — a development build works best.
family.testSentExpo: Sent directly via Expo (fallback). If it arrives, notifications work; we just need to deploy/fix the Edge Function.

connect.title: Invitations
connect.subtitle: Crew members can invite you by email. Accept to see their flights.
connect.noPendingHint: When a crew member sends you an invitation, it will appear here. Make sure they have your correct email.
connect.connectedMessage: You can now see their flights.
